_comments.survey_interval: Show survey every N main comparisons (0 to disable mid-surveys)
_comments.manual_show_n: Number of options shown for manual selection
_comments.manual_select_n: Number user can select from manual options
_comments.track_uncertainty: Save per-item uncertainty history for visualization
_comments.NOTE: BALD algorithm: 3 practice (UI only, not recorded) + 60 main (10 burn-in + 50 BALD acquisition)
